resources.string: Vektor is running to counter motion sickness cues.
Drifting dots are aligning with movement.
Service is idle. Turn on to start cues.
Vektor needs the \"Display over other apps\" permission to show dots while you use other apps. Tap here to grant this permission in settings.
Vektor aligns visual motion clues with physical movement, reducing the sensory conflict that triggers vehicle motion sickness. Made for everyone, completely FOSS.
